name: Authenticated organisation profile slice
description: First vertical slice proving React protected route → session → TanStack Query → contract client → platform-api → permission guard → use case → repository port → Postgres adapter → local Postgres
notes: Canonical architecture achieved via ADR-ACT-0118. Use case uses DI repository port (no pg import). PostgresOrganisationRepository adapter owns SQL. Production routes exported from server/routes.ts (shared by http.ts and tests). Domain validation in normaliseOrganisationDisplayName. no-membership fixture replaces no-permissions. Real Keycloak login (ADR-ACT-0110) is NOT required for this slice.
